title: Modern Apartment in Al Olaya
description: Elegant modern apartment in the heart of Al Olaya, close to business towers and shopping centers. Features floor-to-ceiling windows, central AC, and a gym.

title: Spacious Villa in Al Nakheel
description: Luxurious villa with private garden, driver's room, and maid's room. Quiet neighborhood with easy access to schools and mosques.

title: Studio in Al Malaz
description: Cozy furnished studio ideal for singles or students. Includes kitchenette, fast internet, and is steps from public transport.

title: Luxury Penthouse in King Abdullah District
description: Stunning rooftop penthouse with panoramic city views. Smart home system, private elevator, and rooftop terrace included.

title: Family Apartment in Al Rawdah
description: Bright family apartment near schools and supermarkets. Spacious living area, modern kitchen, and a balcony with garden view.

title: Beachfront Villa in Obhur
description: Exclusive beachfront property with private pool and direct sea access. Premium finishes, open-plan design, and staff quarters.

title: Compact Apartment in Al Hamra
description: Charming furnished apartment in a quiet residential building. Close to Corniche, cafes, and cultural attractions.

title: Modern Townhouse in Al Shati
description: Contemporary townhouse in a gated community near the sea. Private garden, rooftop terrace, and underground parking.

title: Executive Apartment in Al Khobar Corniche
description: Premium furnished apartment with sea views on Al Khobar Corniche. Full hotel-style services, gym, and concierge.

title: Affordable Studio in Al Rakah
description: Budget-friendly studio in a central location. Ideal for expats or young professionals. Close to supermarkets and pharmacies.

title: Family Villa in Al Aqrabiyah
description: Spacious family villa in a well-established neighborhood. Private garden, maid's room, and ample storage space.

title: Investment Apartment in Dammam
description: Great investment opportunity in a rapidly developing area. High rental yield, modern design, and close to King Fahd Road.

title: Cozy Apartment in Al Badi
description: Well-maintained apartment with a friendly community atmosphere. Near Dammam waterfront and local markets.

title: Grand Villa in Al Shula
description: Grand villa with Islamic architecture, large courtyard, and separate majlis. Ideal for large families seeking privacy.

title: New Apartment in Hittin
description: Brand new apartment in Hittin — one of Riyadh's most sought-after districts. Close to international schools and malls.

title: Furnished 1BR in Al Wurud
description: Fully furnished one-bedroom in a quiet, well-maintained building. Walking distance to supermarkets and cafes.

title: Duplex Apartment in Ash Shuhada
description: Elegant duplex with double-height living room, private rooftop, and Italian kitchen. Gated compound with pool access.

title: Affordable 2BR in Al Aziziyah
description: Budget-friendly 2-bedroom in a central Jeddah location. Easy access to Al Haramain Road and public services.

title: Luxury Villa in Al Zahra
description: Lavishly furnished villa in prestigious Al Zahra. Features private pool, cinema room, smart home automation, and landscaped garden.

title: Office-to-Residential Loft in Downtown Jeddah
description: Unique industrial loft in historic Al Balad. UNESCO World Heritage surroundings, exposed brick, and designer furnishings.

title: Sea View Apartment in Al Khobar
description: Stunning sea view apartment on a high floor. Modern finishes, open kitchen, and large balcony overlooking the Gulf.

title: Compound Villa in Dhahran
description: Furnished villa in a premium expat compound. Access to shared pools, tennis courts, gym, and 24-hour security.

title: Starter Apartment in Medina
description: Affordable apartment close to Al-Masjid an-Nabawi. Quiet neighborhood, ideal for families visiting or living in Medina.

title: Furnished Apartment near Haramain Train
description: Convenient furnished apartment steps from Haramain High Speed Railway. Perfect for frequent travelers between Makkah and Medina.

title: Luxury Compound in Makkah
description: Premium compound apartment near Al Haram. Shuttle service to Masjid Al Haram, 24-hour security, pool, and gym.

title: Affordable Studio in Makkah
description: Compact furnished studio walking distance from Al Masjid Al Haram. Ideal for single pilgrims or short-term residents.

title: 3BR Apartment in Al Murjanah
description: Generous 3-bedroom apartment in a peaceful residential area. Near government hospitals and international schools.

title: New Build Villa in Tabuk
description: Newly built modern villa in Tabuk's growing Al Rawdah district. Close to NEOM development corridor and Al-Sharm beaches.

title: Budget 1BR in Al Khobar South
description: Simple and affordable 1-bedroom apartment in a well-connected location. Suitable for couples or solo professionals.

title: Chalet in Abha Mountains
description: Scenic mountain chalet with breathtaking views of Asir region. Fireplace, outdoor terrace, and natural surroundings — perfect for nature lovers.

title: Smart Home Apartment in NEOM
description: Futuristic smart home apartment in the NEOM project zone. Fully automated, solar-powered, and part of an eco-friendly sustainable community.

title: Upscale Apartment in Prince Sultan Road
description: High-end furnished apartment on Prince Sultan Road. Floor-to-ceiling windows, premium appliances, and concierge services.
